message:
test(brenner-loop): additional test coverage for comparison, export, hypothesis

- Add tests for comparison.test.ts (29 lines)
- Add tests for errorRecovery.test.ts (63 lines)
- Add tests for export.test.ts (49 lines)
- Add tests for hypothesis.test.ts (3 lines)
- Clean up types.ts (20 lines removed)
- Update linter-fixtures.test.ts snapshots
- Update PhaseTimeline.test.tsx
- Update program-storage.test.ts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
